headline: How The United Airlines (UAL) Investment Narrative Is Shifting With Fuel Costs And Guidance
summary: United Airlines Holdings is seeing only a slight shift in the analytical view, with one modeled fair value estimate moving from US$130.17 to US$129.83, about a 0.3% adjustment. Analysts are tying this small change to updated views on fuel costs and company guidance, leaving opinions split between pressure on earnings and support from demand and revenue trends. As you read on, you will see how to track these evolving calls and what they might mean for your own research process. Analyst Price...

headline: Peacock Takes Flight: United Launches New Inflight Entertainment Channel
summary: United today announced the launch of a new, dedicated inflight entertainment channel featuring content from NBCUniversal's streaming home, Peacock, bringing fan-favorite series onboard and giving customers even more choice and flexibility in how and what they watch while in the air.
